title: (Junior) Category Analyst - Data & Market Insights Einkauf Non Food (m/w/d)
required_skills: Analytical mindset with data compilation and multi-dimensional analysis
bonus_skills: Experience with KPI reporting from Controlling context
Customer Insights or Consumer Trend analysis
matched_skills: Retail sector exposure (ECE Group — automotive and furniture retail)
missing_skills: German language at professional working level (B1 present, but HQ role likely requires B2+)
Category management or assortment planning experience
Consumer / market trend analysis in FMCG or Non Food context
Experience with international procurement or buying processes
core_responsibilities: Aggregating and preparing diverse data sources (KPIs, Customer Insights, market and consumer trends) to support decision-making
Identifying market potentials and preparing datasets to develop the Non Food portfolio
Collaborating with international teams to prepare data-driven decisions at HQ and across Lidl countries
Contributing to strategic special concepts and creating decision templates for long-term assortment planning
recommended_emphasis: Highlight ECE Group retail competitive analysis and market sizing as direct proof of retail data analysis capability
Lead with Power BI (PL-300 certified) and Looker Studio as concrete BI tool credentials matching the role requirement
Frame KPI reporting and recurring competitor monitoring (IPC) as evidence of the 'regular data bundling' responsibility
Emphasise executive-ready report packaging to align with the Entscheidungsvorlagen (decision template) responsibility
Position customer segmentation and cohort analysis as Customer Insights Management adjacency
Note German B1 but pair with strong English C1 and Chinese C2 to signal international team value in a global Lidl context
Stress junior-readiness: quantify scope and impact wherever possible to compensate for limited years of experience

company_info.size_raw: Lidl Stiftung — internationaler Einzelhandel, weltweite Ausrichtung; Lidl is a globally known retailer with 10,001+ employees
